basic_details.job_title: KRCL – Section Officer, Personnel Inspector and More – 9 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) Recruitment 2026 for 9 posts of Section Officer, Personnel Inspector and More Posts. Candidates with CA/CMA, B.Com, M.Com, Diploma/Degree can attend Walkin.The Walk-in on 22-06-2026. For detailed information please visit KRCL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified CA/CMA, Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, B.Com, M.Com, Inter CA/CMA, Diploma/Degree in Labour Laws or equivalent.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated Remuneration ranges from Rs. 41380 to Rs. 76660 per month.

seo_tags: Konkan Railway Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Section Officer, Personnel Inspector and More Posts
